title: Generation Audit Contract
bindingRequirements: blueprintId must equal the Approved Expansion Blueprint ID
characterUnitId must equal the selected existing Character Unit ID
materialDNAVersion must equal the frozen Material DNA version
paletteVersion must equal the frozen Palette version
cloudCollarVersion must equal the frozen Cloud Collar version
approvalTimestamp must match the valid Human Sign-off approval evidence
generatorType, modelVersion and promptVersion must identify the exact controlled generation configuration

rules.condition: all nine audit fields are present, non-empty and correctly bound
rules.requiredAction: attach immutable audit evidence to permission evaluation

rules.condition: any required audit field is missing or empty
Blueprint ID does not match the Approved Expansion Blueprint
rules.requiredAction: bind audit evidence to the approved Blueprint

rules.condition: Character Unit or frozen version field is stale or mismatched
rules.requiredAction: rebind to frozen source versions and revalidate

rules.condition: Approval Timestamp is absent, invalid, expired or differs from approval evidence
audit evidence belongs to a different request, Blueprint, approval or generation configuration
rules.requiredAction: invalidate permission and rebuild audit evidence
